title: ServerlessInvocation
description: Represents a single invocation of a serverless function, including execution metadata such as cold start, duration, and result status.

invocation_id.description: Platform-assigned unique identifier for this invocation, often the request ID or trace ID.

function_name.description: Name of the function that was invoked.

platform.description: Serverless platform on which the invocation ran.

trigger_type.description: Type of trigger that produced this invocation.

billed_duration_ms.description: Billed duration in milliseconds, rounded up by the platform's billing granularity.

memory_used_mb.description: Peak memory consumption observed during the invocation, in megabytes.

cold_start.description: Whether this invocation incurred a cold start (new runtime container or isolate initialization).

init_duration_ms.description: Initialization time for cold starts, in milliseconds. Zero or null for warm invocations.

status_code.description: HTTP-style status code returned to the caller, when applicable.

error.description: Error information if the invocation failed.

region.description: Region or edge POP where the invocation executed.

trace_id.description: Distributed tracing identifier propagated from the caller.
